summary: Added --input-json structured input mode to decompose.py. Implemented process_structured_input function that copies verbatim fields directly from JSON while still validating against source document. Updated SKILL.md documentation to describe both Mode A (LLM extraction) and Mode B (structured input). Created input schema JSON for validation.
test_results: Added structured input processing that copies our_take verbatim from JSON, builds support arrays from story_ids, and validates against source document using fuzzy substring matching. Manifest tracking updated to distinguish between extraction methods.
learnings: Structured input mode bypasses LLM extraction for skill data but still uses LLM for other categories (overview, profile, etc.)
Validation still occurs even with trusted structured input to prevent data integrity issues
Input schema provides clear contract for upstream systems to follow
Mode B maintains same output format as Mode A for downstream compatibility
